common.tagline: Agentic workspace that runs your work end to end

hero.title:
One input.
Full execution.
hero.subtitle: Research, documents, browser automation, file management — start from one input and the agent runs it end to end.

trust.label: Who's waiting for Usan
items: Office workers tired of repetitive tasks

features.title: What Usan executes
features.subtitle: Not a chatbot — an execution engine. Plan, execute, approve, and deliver from a single composer.

smartAssistant.title: Agent Runtime
smartAssistant.description: From planning to step-by-step execution, approval requests, and artifact generation — one agent handles it all. Every step is shown transparently in the timeline.

easyToUse.title: Universal Composer
easyToUse.description: Text, files, screenshots, voice — input anything and the right tool gets selected. Switch between search, research, browser, and document modes with chips.

familyProtect.title: Connector Hub
familyProtect.description: File system, browser, web services, email, calendar, messenger — all connected. MCP-based extensions let you automate any app.

accessibility.title: Artifact Layer
accessibility.description: Reports, summaries, tables, code, checklists — review and edit agent outputs instantly. Version control and export included.

step1.title: Install & Connect
step1.description: Download and run — local AI and cloud models connect automatically

step2.title: Input & Execute
step2.description: Describe your goal in the Composer — the agent plans and runs it

step3.title: Approve & Deliver
step3.description: High-risk actions require approval, completed outputs are stored as artifacts

waitlist.title: Be the first to know
waitlist.description: Leave your email and we'll reach out as soon as Usan is ready.
waitlist.success: Thank you! We'll notify you first when we launch.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.description: Agentic workspace that runs your work end to end
